cells.rationale: Reviewed for jetkvm_display_capture: capture operates only inside an already-owned session and has no takeover option or ownership publication.
Reviewed for jetkvm_display_status: display status is read-only inside the incumbent session and cannot request ownership.
Reviewed for jetkvm_input_keyboard: keyboard input requires an existing generation and cannot acquire or take over device ownership.
Reviewed for jetkvm_input_mouse: mouse input requires an existing observation and cannot acquire or take over device ownership.
Reviewed for jetkvm_input_paste: paste requires an existing observation and cannot acquire or take over device ownership.
Reviewed for jetkvm_input_release: release drains an already-owned generation and has no ownership acquisition path.
Reviewed for jetkvm_power_control: power control requires an existing generation and cannot publish device ownership.

Reviewed for jetkvm_input_mouse: mouse actions cannot request takeover; they are fenced to an existing authorized generation.
Reviewed for jetkvm_input_paste: paste cannot request takeover; it is fenced to an existing authorized generation.
Reviewed for jetkvm_input_release: release is an emergency operation for the current generation, not an ownership publication operation.
Reviewed for jetkvm_power_control: power control cannot request takeover and only mutates through an existing authorized generation.

cells.rationale: Reviewed for jetkvm_input_release: release is one generation-drain operation whose partial state is covered by cleanup and unknown-outcome semantics, not a caller event list.
Reviewed for jetkvm_power_control: power accepts one semantic action; ON/OFF serialization is covered by the dedicated ATX rows rather than a caller event list.
Reviewed for jetkvm_session_connect: connect accepts one ownership operation and no caller-supplied multi-event sequence.
Reviewed for jetkvm_session_reconnect: reconnect accepts one replacement operation and no caller-supplied multi-event sequence.
Reviewed for jetkvm_session_status: session status is a read and has no caller-supplied multi-event sequence.
Reviewed for jetkvm_display_capture: capture creates the fresh observation required after reconnect rather than consuming an observation.
Reviewed for jetkvm_display_status: display status consumes no input observation and remains a read-only status operation.
